working_on: S-0142 fallout: skip-caller worktree-sweep + boot-time bulk sweep + ADR 0076/0057 amendments + #109/#110/#111 health-check fixes + stale worktree cleanup
outcome_summary: Reversed ADR 0076's S-0142 post-close-sweep wiring (which destroyed S-0142's own worktree before user follow-up). ADR 0076 Amendment v2: both build + routine close NO LONGER sweep caller's own worktree; cleanup shifts to next-session boot via session-start.sh invoking sweep_worktrees.sh --apply --quiet. Skip-caller pre-flight in both routine_worktree_sweep.py + sweep_worktrees.sh; enriched preserve-report (path/branch/merged/ahead/behind/dirty-files/last-commit/guidance). Opt-in --allow-caller-self for tests. ADR 0057 revised Decision 1: interactive audits MAY adjudicate inline via AskUserQuestion + file health-check-finding Issues same session (mirrors ADR 0040 build-readiness gate pattern); routine-fired audits keep user-buffered shape. Closed health-check Issues #109/#110/#111 (validate.py mempalace_hnsw_divergence unconditional checks_run; scan_issue_collisions.py upstream + [TRIGGER:] filter -- empirical 17->11 collisions in-session; scan_orphans.py + health_check.py is_marker_line_back_pinned classifier with forward-pin trigger vocabulary -- verified expression-contract-instantiation.md no longer false-flags). Issue #112 (HNSW rebuild) remains deferred per its own separate-maintenance-session guidance. Removed 3 stale worktrees with per-worktree user confirmation (S-0103 crazy-ritchie + S-0121 admiring-faraday + S-0128 vibrant-antonelli). 98 pytests passing (11 new). 3 commits: eager-claim 8e11f75 + WS1 deliverable f7d956b + WS2 deliverable 6531726 + close (pending). Soft-warns baseline carryover: issue_collision 11 (down from 17), missing_rigor_score 360, orphan_leaf 1.

scope_delivery.note: All three workstreams from approved plan landed: ADR 0076 Amendment v2 + ADR 0057 revised Decision 1 + boot-time bulk sweep wiring (Workstream 1); Issues #109/#110/#111 closed (Workstream 2); 3 stale worktrees removed under per-worktree confirmation (Workstream 3). Issue #112 honored its own deferral guidance per pre-execution agreement.
